title: Spamton Totem
description:
Changes the totem to be Spamton from Deltarune.
Also changes the advancement name and the sound effect played when used.

If minecraft says it's incompatible ignore it. It should still work.
body:
A resource pack that replaces the totem with Spamton from Deltarune.

It also changes the advancement name and the totem used sound effect to "Deal gone wrong" by Toby Fox.
